GB 38450一2019
regular square,， rectangular，or circular continuous flat surface， and the ratio of its length to width
is not greaterthan 5, and the length of the largest side or diameter is not less than 270 mm
3.2
luminous efficacy of LED flat panel luminaire
Ratio of the initial luminous flux to the input power of LED flat panel Iluminaire under the specified
testing conditions
3.3
minimium allowable vaules of energy efficiency for LED flat panelluminaire
Minimum allowable value of Iluminous efficacy of LED flat panel Iluminaire under the specified test-
ing conditions
4 Technical requirements
4.1 Energy efficiency grades
The energy efficiency levels of LED flat panel luminaires are classified into three grades，of which
Grade 1 is the most efficient， The Iluminous efficacy of LED flat panel luminaires of each grade
shall not be less than respective values specified in Table 1.
Table 1一Energy efficiency grades of LED flat panelluminaires
Rated correlated color                                      Luminous efficacy”
temperatureCCCT)                                           Im/W

” ForLED flat panelluminaires with a rated color rendering index (R.) 三90, the specified values of luminous ef-

ficacy of each grade shall be decreased by 10 Im/W.
4.2 Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency
Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency of LED flat panel Iluminaires are the values of Grade
3 specified in Table 1.
4.3 Color rendering index CCRID
The rated general CRI，R.,，of LED flat panel Iluminaires shall not be less than 80，and the de-
crease of measured value relative to rated value shall not be greater than 3. The measured spe-
cial CRI (CRs) shall be greater than 0.

2
